title: Manga Series Master Plan
description: Per-series long-horizon plan (default 100 episodes) sitting ABOVE per-arc storyboards and BELOW the series_plan listing. Arc segmentation is genre-derived from config/manga/manga_pacing_by_genre.yaml arc_cadence blocks — never a fixed 12. Authority: docs/specs/MANGA_SERIES_MASTER_PLAN_CONTRACT.md

genre_id.description: Canonical genre id (config/manga/canonical_genre_list.yaml). Resolved to a pacing family via manga_pacing_by_genre.yaml genre_family_aliases.

pacing_family.description: Resolved pacing family key in manga_pacing_by_genre.yaml genre_pacing (must match alias resolution of genre_id). For cadence_source=study_webtoon this records the print family the series would otherwise inherit.

cadence_source.description: Where the arc-cadence numbers come from. pacing_yaml = the family arc_cadence block (default). study_webtoon = webtoon-format series (NO YAML family row exists; numbers from artifacts/research/manga_arc_cadence_study_2026-07-24.md §Webtoon: arc grain 15-30 eps, platform seasons 78-115+). study_us_illustrated = US illustrated self-help lane (artifacts/research/us_illustrated_self_help_format_study_2026-07-24.md; book/strip frames, not episode cadence).

cadence_ref.description: Evidence pointer for the cadence numbers (yaml path anchor or study section).

episode_unit.description: Serialization unit one 'episode' maps to. Monthly-chapter print genres are NOT 1:1 comparable with weekly units at equal story mass — episode_unit_mapping_note must state the assumption. 'strip' = US illustrated strip-serial frame (strip = atom feeding a collected book, study §6).

episode_unit_mapping_note.description: The mapping assumption for this series' episode unit (e.g. '1 episode = 1 monthly 40-60p chapter; arc_cadence counts are in this unit').

episode_horizon.description: Planning horizon in episodes. Default 100. Low-confidence/no-evidence families (essay, memoir, graphic_medicine) MAY carry 48-60 with horizon_rationale citing the study evidence line.

horizon_rationale.description: Required when episode_horizon != 100: the evidence-cited reason (e.g. 'no 100-episode long-runner exists in this family; study §essay').

plan_frame.description: Routing per series_plan format/master_format (contract §US-illustrated addendum): manga/webtoon formats use serialized_episode; a non-serialized direct_self_help_illustrated book uses book_format (page/word-mass targets, NOT episode counts); illustrated content that ships as a series uses strip_serial (Instagram/Tumblr strip cadence feeding a collected book — NOT webtoon-episode structure; no episode-framed wellness comps exist, study §6).

book_format_params.description: book_format frame only. Parameters come from config/manga/us_illustrated_pilot_cells.yaml (provenance: RESEARCHED, Lane 02 study) — reference the cell, do not restate numbers. Class-A gift books have NO chapter contract (4-8 loose movements, study §2d): use movement_count and page-flow beats, never a forced chapter_count.

structure_class.description: Sub-format class per study §2d (A gift / B doodle-strip / C graphic-essay / D graphic-medicine / E illustrated-prose).

params_ref.description: Pointer to the researched format_parameters block (e.g. config/manga/us_illustrated_pilot_cells.yaml#<cell>).

mode.description: Series identity mode (XOR per config/manga/manga_mode_vessels.yaml). 'none' = regular series: self-help stays genre-native subtext with no mode vessel.

teacher_id.description: Metadata only — the teacher is NEVER named in plan prose (check_manga_story_authored doctrine).

self_help_topic_set.description: The brand's topic set; every arc self_help_topic must come from this set.

first_major_shift.description: MUST be null when the pacing family's first_major_shift_by is null (healing, horror, supernatural_everyday, gag, essay — no status-quo-shift convention; the loop is the product). Otherwise required non-null with episode <= first_major_shift_by (+25% tolerance).

season_wheels.description: seasonal_cycle families only: calendar wheels the cycles hang on (study: plan first-100 as ~3-4 season wheels with demographic, not plot, drift).

drift.description: What changes across this wheel (demographic/relational drift, never forced plot shift).

arcs.description: Arc spans must tile 1..episode_horizon with no gaps/overlaps. Count and lengths derive from the family arc_cadence block (episodes_per_arc_range, arc_pattern) — NEVER a fixed 12.

migration.description: 48-ep -> master-plan upgrade record (contract §Migration). Existing 48-ep artifacts stay valid — inventory EXTENDS, never REDUCED.

detailed_window_end.description: Last episode of the near-term detailed window (Q-MPU-01: eps 1-48 detailed for flagship-first wave; 49+ outline-level).

source.description: Source credit for absorbed plan content (e.g. PR #295 branch + path).

conformance.description: Marketing/genre conformance self-check — machine-checkable fields, not prose vibes.

status.description: checked = validated against config/manga/mc_endurance_checklists.yaml family keys; pending_lane_04 = the checklist file is not yet on main (manga-mc-endurance-research-merged not emitted).

acceptance_layer.description: Honest acceptance layer, same enum as arc_storyboard_plan. A validator PASS is at most structurally_clear / authored_candidate — never bestseller.

detail_level.description: detailed = carries per-episode plans (the operator's second pass); outline = premise/promise level (episodes beyond the detailed window per Q-MPU-01).

arc_premise.description: What this arc is about — an external situation, not a therapy summary.

arc_promise.description: What the reader is promised this arc will pay off.

status_quo_shift.description: What durable change the arc leaves behind. MUST be null in families whose arc_cadence first_major_shift_by is null (cyclical genres — forcing a shift breaks the genre contract).

endurance_checklist_refs.description: Anchors into the MC endurance checklist/study, format mc_endurance_study#<family>/<section> (Lane 04 stable keys: must_have / should_have / anti_patterns / endurance_mechanics).

self_help_topic.description: Must come from the plan self_help_topic_set (brand topic set).

source_arc_ref.description: Migration credit: the 48-ep plan block / arc plan this arc was upgraded from.

episodes.description: Required (covering the full span) when detail_level=detailed.

vessel.description: teacher mode: the genre-native vessel (config/manga/manga_mode_vessels.yaml genres.<genre>.teacher). The teacher is NEVER named.

arc_teaching_resolution.description: teacher mode: what the arc-level teaching resolves to across the arc (doctrine earned, never lectured).

motif.description: music mode: the arc-level musical motif per MUSIC_MODE_MANGA_V1_SPEC.

logline.description: One sentence including an external force (mirrors arc_storyboard_plan logline rule).

genre_pleasure_beat.description: The genre-native pleasure this episode delivers (what the reader came for).

self_help_topic_beat.description: How the self-help topic advances as subtext through genre mechanics — never as lecture.

position.description: Where the episode's forward hook/cliff lands. 'none' is legal in cyclical genres (quiet-close convention).

checklist_refs.description: Refs into genre/editor checklists (Lane 07) and mc_endurance_study anchors.
